title: Kenyan Chicken Curry Fettuccine
description: A unique fusion of Kenyan and Italian flavors, featuring tender chicken in a flavorful curry sauce served over fettuccine pasta.
instructions: Cook the fettuccine pasta according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.

Season the chicken breast with salt, black pepper, and kenyan spices. Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Add the chicken and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
In the same skillet, add curry powder and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the tangy tomato sauce and stir to combine. Bring the sauce to a simmer and cook for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the cooked fettuccine pasta to the skillet and toss to combine with the curry sauce.
Slice the cooked chicken breast and add it to the pasta. Toss to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, topped with grated parmesan cheese.
Enjoy your Kenyan Chicken Curry Fettuccine!
Note: Kenyan spices can be omitted or substituted with a mixture of cumin, coriander, and cayenne pepper for a similar flavor.
